reviews.review_text: Have enjoyed my stay so much, the staff are friemdly and helpful, the park is clean and has convenient amenities. Great relaxing vibe. Thanks for a pleasant stay. I will be back again for sure, camping locally to run my business until I can move my family back from Queensland 😊
This place is very well taken care of. Close to the beach and the staff are very helpful
Super friendly staff, clean showers and toilets, nice area!
Large site. staff extremely helpful. Good equipment for children. Two separate areas for caravans one great for families and the other a nice quiet area for older couples.

Great park, well maintained with good facilities. We stayed on an ensuite site which was immaculately clean. Close to the lake with good shared path. We stayed over ANZAC weekend and it was super busy. Would definitely return.

This was our first time staying at Canton Holiday Park (Ensuite site) and can't fault anything.
The staff we're amazing so welcoming and friendly and nothing was too much, they made you feel so welcome. We loved the daily greetings from all staff no matter what area they worked in.
The park and facilities are very well maintained and  kept so clean.
We stayed for six nights over the April school holidays and looking forward to booking in again. It's not the same being back at home and not being able to watch the beautiful sunset over the lake.

Service -1⭐

The only friendly and welcoming staff member was the cleaner.

Stayed over Easter (Thu–Mon) and had a poor experience. Staff were rude, unwelcoming, and overly aggressive from arrival.

One family had to leave early due to illness with their elders and were accused of being “sneaky” just for bringing a second car to pack up in the pouring rain. I tried later to use their code to pack my camping gear and was not allowed, accused again of being sneaky and was told the entry code had been cancelled.

We paid for 4 sites and only used 3 after all this. Very disappointing. Never going back!
Fantastic park, staff are wonderful- so friendly and accommodating always making you feel welcome. Park is tidy and amenities  are clean. Great pool and the best views of sunset over the lake!
A perfect day at Canton Beach

The Best!!! Most Amazing most accomodating place to stay ever!!! Thank you for all the suggestions for tourist attractions and best things to do!!! Very good hosts! Will totally recommend this Beautiful location and great caravan park for overnight and a bit longer stays! Thank you

Staff are smoking on a no smoking site, site is not maintained, trees in the middle of the plot, some of amenities not working, at 9 pm we got told to stay silent because of noise complaints even though we are allowed to make noise until 10pm.
Very bad facilities. Not recommended at all. Big site but single kitchen and nothing to do.
Great park location 10 out of 10

I recently stayed 2 nights on a powered site in my campervan and the rest of my family stayed in the cabins.
I was impressed with the layout of the park, the location, the super clean amenities, friendliness of the staff and the very reasonable cost. My grandchildren really enjoyed the lovely pool and the jumping air pillow, kept them entertained during our stay. The lake foreshore walk is lovely with really good playgrounds along the way. I can certainly recommend a stay there.

We stayed on a powered site with our motorhome. Rach at reception was outstanding! I travelled Australia for 2 years and never met such a great receptionist- she's so lovely, helpful and makes you feel at home right away! She was so great with our toddler, too :) Thank you so much! We'd definitely recommend staying here- beautiful campground, clean amenities, great location and good value for money!

Amazing place, what a gem!

Since day one we felt looked after by Tenna and the campsite team. Great customer service experience, amazing clean and tidy facilities and a beautiful spot just between the lake and the beach.
Also, here is plenty of coffee shops and restaurants around to enjoy even more your time in Canton Beach!

Definitely if you are around Central Coast have a few days here!
We’ll be back!

Driving through the main drag of Toukley it makes you wonder if there is a hidden gem - well I have news for you - THIS IS THE PLACE!!  Nestled along the bay is this beautiful spot.  We stayed on a powered site right across the way from the pool and amenities - the staff are very welcoming and its so peaceful, not to mention the grounds and amenties are immaculate - a must stay!!
Don't know about the whole joint or other cabin's and we just stopped 1 night, but the cabin we got is unreal,  on the lake, clean and comfy as. Would stay here for sure again if in area.
We went there not expecting much but it was excellent  ! It has a beautiful new pool that isn't yet on their website.
My only complaint here is the lack of tv service. This means having to use your own data to watch TV, including free to air.
Wonderful friendly staff, cleanest amenities i have ever seen, easily accessible, definitely coming back soon

We visited Australia from uk,we booked one week, but due to a family accident , we went to them to see if they could accommodate us for 3 weeks, to our relief, they lady went above and beyond to help us ,she was amazing, we've been here before and love the site , I highly recommend it. Thank you for you're help and our time with you ❤️we will be back .

Great location and with the recent addition of the pool, bbq area and camping bathroom ensuites our whole family all had a great time. Further the team went out of their way to help my brother and his family when they decided to stay an extra night.

Great location with a very nice lakeside walking path. Only 6 minutes to Hargraves Beach. Nice atmosphere. Beautiful sunsets. Nice clean modern amenities. Nice cabins. Surprised they have foxtel!. Only suggestion is air conditioning in the main bedroom because it was unbearably hot. Rooms were clean and very comfortable otherwise. Would still come back.

We spent the Australia Day long weekend at Canton Beach Holiday Park and honestly had the best time. The amenities were great, the staff were super friendly, and even the other visitors made it feel like a little community. There was so much to do nearby and the walking path was a standout. Watching the sunset was definitely my favourite part of the whole trip. Couldn’t recommend this place enough 😊

Gotta be the worst holiday park I’ve ever been to the swimming pools are absolutely disgusting. I got out Band-Aids all over me. Don’t check their waters at all the smallest Little backyard pool for all the people will be nice if they clean it every morning don’t recommend it I’ll give it 0 out of 10

Wonderful stay on a van ensuite site. After many calls around the area Canton Beach welcomed us and our Pup. Ensuite was spotless and fresh fitted out, good size. Site had matting down for camper to park next to. So great to see kids running around enjoying the pool and play facilities. Lake was beautiful and all areas were clean and well maintained with numerous BBQ facilities.

Stayed for 2 nights.
Cabin was clean and comfortable
Kids enjoyed the pool and the pillow
Staff were friendly
Right near the lake, lovely to look at especially near night time
Close to everything you need.
Honestly best place I’ve ever stayed at.
Definitely will stay again
Also cheap!!!
Fantastic park with good facilities and friendly staff.
Ein sehr ordentlicher Platz mit tollem und freundlichem Personal

Stayed on an unpowered site here on and off for the last 4 weeks, have always been accommodating and helpful when booking. Amenities are very clean and well looked after. Location is perfect for sunset over the water.  Will definitely be staying here again
Very comfortable and welcoming holiday park! The bathrooms and ammenities were super clean and the staff were extremely friendly and knowledgeable
Nice place but rather windy.  Stayed in a cabin which was adequate.  Lounge was rather uncomfortable.  I know it's a third world problem but couldn't television from bed .

We used an ensuite site which was very good. It was clean and they provided bath mat hand towel face washer soap shampoo conditioner body wash and moisturizer
The site was a good size and easy walk to the beach
Good size camp kitchen, many showers and toilets in the communal bathroom laundry room had 3 washers and 2 dryers and only $4 per load. Pool is currently being built
Great staff and lovely open park with plenty of space to walk our dog as well as close to water.  Lots of services nearby.

The owners are lovely people make my family and I feel really welcome there so caring we'll be staying again for sure thanx guys U r both amazing owners the bathrooms r really really clean it's close to everything you need
Great campsite with friendly helpful staff and close to the water with all amenities on your doorstep. Just a bit disappointed the pool was closed for renovation and we weren’t made aware of this.

Absolutely outstanding stay at NRMA Canton Holiday Park. From the moment we arrived the service was warm, genuine and incredibly helpful. A special shout out to the amazing receptionist who checked me in and looked after me throughout our stay, she set the tone for the whole trip.

The facilities are excellent and the park is kept spotless. There was some construction underway, but it didn’t hinder my stay or take anything away from the atmosphere. The amenities are modern and well maintained, and the park has a relaxed, comfortable feel. The beach is only a short walk away, and having the Canton Sports Bar literally a step from the park was a great bonus.

Perfect for families, couples or anyone wanting a quiet coastal break with great service. I can’t wait to return.

Staff super helpful and friendly, rates are great with NRMA discount. There is a new pool going in and new amenities block under construction. Were self contained so unsure of toilet shower cleanliness. Beautifil sunsets over the water. Close to sports club,bottle shop 5 mins away aswell as great pizza place 👌
Happy campers
Great accommodation in a great location. Cabin was great,  especially for the price, with everything you could need. Extremely helpful and friendly staff. Ill be returning

This is a great park we’ve stayed at multiple times , especially at Christmas time when they accomodate dogs  when so many others don’t ! The sunset views are some of the best you will get and the staff are always welcoming and accommodating ,it’s central to our fave beaches and even better now they are near completion of a pool . Definitely recommended 👌

Great Customer Service! I had an excellent experience thanks to Rachael! She went above and beyond to provide amazing customer service — friendly, professional, and genuinely helpful from start to finish.

레이크랑 바다랑 양쪽으로 있어서 놀기좋음.
화장실 샤워시설 깨끗하고 공용식수대 바베큐장 깨끗함. 우리는 10월 4일, 3박4일 다녀왔는데 수영장은 공사중이였고 와이파이도 업데이트 중이라 사용못함.  롱위켄이라서 두배로 요금냈는데 사용하지못해서 그게 아쉬웠음. 빠른시간내에 공사마무리 해주세요 또갈수있도록.

We camped here over the Labour Day weekend with two sites + 1 cabin and while it wasn’t a terrible experience overall, there are a few important things future visitors should be aware of.

One key difference from other holiday parks we’ve stayed at is that this site has full-time residents living there. It created a slightly uncomfortable atmosphere, as it often felt like we were encroaching on their space rather than enjoying a typical holiday park environment. It’s not necessarily a deal-breaker, but it’s worth knowing ahead of time.

Another issue was that there were rules not listed on the website — particularly a strict one-car-per-site policy. We had two campsites with multiple guests, and only being allowed one car per site was a real hassle. It would’ve helped if this was made clearer before booking.

The staff were constantly patrolling, which we understand can be for safety, but it felt a bit overbearing. They frequently called people out for minor issues, which made it hard to fully relax.

Lastly, our campsite had a persistent sewage smell — strong enough to wake us up at night. This may have just been our section of the park, but it really impacted our stay.

This campground has potential, but clearer communication, a more welcoming environment, and better site maintenance would go a long way.

Pros: extremely clean public bathrooms, bins everywhere for easy access and a stunning lakeside view for that crisp sunset!

$60 powered en suite site good. Friendly staff. Supermarkets and shops a short drive. Quite a large park. There's a shore walk, don't go too far down the bush track end or you'll find yourself in the Everglades. Camp kitchen looked good though didn't use it. In fairness should be a 4-5 star place.

Unfortunately really didn't enjoy my time there as several cabins directly in front appeared occupied by an extended Urdu family with zero consideration for anyone else around them, and not very friendly at all. Noisiest site I've been on in six months of travelling, and was right under the Sydney Airport flight path a few days prior.

Great location  , very friendly and helpful staff  , here for an annual car show that my family and friends have attended for the last 15 years  , however , this year l now have to pay an extra $65 to stay till the show ends at 2pm , where previous  years we could leave all our belongings and food  in the cabin .

Waljable to town on path .staff great setting lovely very clean.club courtesy bus and chinese food that's great.do yourself a favour we had not heard of this town and ventured there so glad we did.it was rainy on our visit we were attempting to keep  in front of the rain.inland was flooding so we took rainy coast back to vic.dog friendly that's a plus.it would be better in fine weather.canton park powered site was a lovely surprise.
Only stayed here one night but we really enjoyed this park. Newer facilities,  great location,  friendly service. The only let down were the showers they were not the best.

Great clean facilities and really helpful staff. Kids loved the blow up pillow and the giant sand pit around it.

Has some big sites for some larger vans (we had no trouble at 9.5 metres).

Honestly only complaint could be the shower could be an inch further away from the wall.

Impeccably clean and well maintained cabin with a Lakeview for a very good price as it was winter. This park is well located with walking distance to shops and sports club for meals - highly recommended.

The Management and staff are amazing, helpful and friendly.
I cannot fault the park.
Great place, Clean, spacious and well thought out floor plans. Airconditioning & heating works Amazing. Will definitely book again.
It was ok
Camping sites are great.

We went as part of a large group all with our own tents and vans.  The amenities were perfect.  Clean, fresh and close.  There was plenty for the young ones and we all enjoyed standing on the shore watching the sunset. Also just a short walk to local shops.  Highly recommend this spot for a peaceful family friendly holiday.

We were a large group booking 6 sites, 4 of which were ensuite sites. The ensuites were lovely and modern with heat lamps and a beautifully hot showers with decent water pressure! The sites themselves were roomy and flat and we didn’t feel like we were too close to each other.

The staff were absolutely fantastic from our first interaction when trying to arrange sites close enough to suit our group to booking and then having to move our booking due to extenuating circumstances, nothing was too hard or difficult for the staff. Troy and Teena checked in with us several times in the lead up to our great big camping trip and they were so helpful and nice to deal with.

During the weekend the staff popped over to our site to check that we were all settled and didn’t need anything and Troy also checked in with us to make sure we were comfortable and having a good time.

When walking around the park if we came across the staff there was always a lovely “hello, how is your day, followed by a let us know if you need anything and enjoy the rest of your day”

Some of our group hired the pedal carts (kids and big kids) and they had a great time riding around the park for the hour.

The kiosk is well stocked with treats like slushees and ice creams, chips and choccies but also has some of the essentials in case you forget them. There’s also some lovely gifts at reasonable prices to take home and remember your Canton Beach stay.

The camp kitchen, bbq areas and bathrooms are all well maintained, clean and well stocked at all times showing that the owners and staff really take pride in the park.

We are already looking forward to booking another group camping trip soon and can’t wait to be back

Oh before I forget, my son wanted me to mention that his highlight was the amazing jumping pillow and that he loved it a lot - it was a great way to make friends with other kids staying in the park.

Behind the holiday park you can see the sunset on the lake 💛
Clean and good amenities.
There is an Aldi pretty close.
There’re beaches close as well.
Neet large, well maintained park. Updated amenities. Friendly staff. Staying on camping site. Will use this park again. Short walk to Club or Coffee shop.
Great place to spend family time specially for the kids
I always enjoy staying at Canton Beach. The location is great, the powered sites are a good size, and the staff are beyond awesome.
The best

We stayed over the Easter break we had a total of 5 sites all up with all the family we have stayed at the park before and will be back again we are always made feel welcome great activities for the children thanks Troy, Tina and crew see you next trip :)

First time visiting this park , Powered Van Site , Large well grassed site and clean amenities, Friendly staff , 1st week of the school holidays and surprised at how quiet everything was , Easy walk to Coles or Aldi ,
Absolutely Amazing 😍

Staff were amazing and so helpful. Park itself was so clean and well kept.
Bathrooms were immaculate and I will definitely be back. The most I have ever been impressed with a holiday park. Couldn’t have been happier
Lovely location right on the lake. Clean, modern, newish amenities. Lots of shade. Dog 🐕  friendly.
Stopped there for 3 nights.

Our third visit at the park. Great location, the facilities are all kept really clean. The staff are all friendly and very approachable.
Would definitely recommend and will be back a for another visit👌

I had the Worst Experience Ever!  The staff were rude especially the staff at reception. Zero customer service. Our stay was during the Australia Day Long weekend and the staff did not represent the true Australian values. The staff met us with hostility and were very racist towards me and my family and friends. We were harassed everyday of our stay and truly felt unwelcome. This holiday park needs to set up its game with the so many strict rules and need to change their staff effective immediately.
Staff are the face of any business and when u receive awful treatment and no respect and kindness then NO WAY woll i ever return to this terrible place.

My wife, kids and I stayed here for 3 nights over this long weekend. Facilities and grounds were clean. Staff were abrasive and not welcoming at all. They have too many CHILDISH rules. We were told to turn our gas bbq off at 9pm, how ridiculous. Sorry but we will definitely not be coming back .

Staff very rude. Too many stupid rules. Staff and security are hungry for power, treating us and many other guests in an abrupt manner. This place is not about having rules for safety for their guests. The park was fully booked out, however the atmosphere is boring. Everyone just waiting to pounce on complaints regardless of how much we tried to follow rules. This review is a shame , because the location and park itself has great potential. It’s the very rude staff who ruined our experience, even if the rules remained , the staff enforcing them need to relax a little. Bad experience, will not be returning .

This park is a great location, however the staff are very rude and unprofessional during our 4 night stay. The park has way too many unreasonable rules with security lurking around & watching. No music / noise after 10pm which is a fantastic rule to have , ensuring others can enjoy a peaceful stay. However in saying this, we were not even able to talk (almost whispering, no exaggeration!). Staff and other guests way too sensitive and lifeless!! This is meant to be a happy place for ALL to enjoy. Way too many Karen’s at this place, which ruined our stay. The only one car per site rule is ridiculous when we were not even able to drop off heavy items and take car back out , as per their policy ! There needs to be some ‘give & take’ with slight allowances for those willing to respect and obey rules . There was a group of 8 adults with us and all of us will not return due to staff abrupt & rude behaviour and the ridiculous rules across the entire park !!! I would suggest management look into staff training as a priority. THUMBS DOWN

Love this place. Staff and service is amazing.  Check-in was easy and efficient. Amenities are clean and well maintained. The location is great with waterfront views and is great for canoeing. Close to shops too! This is our second visit to this park and will definitely return.
Good quiet Xmas

This is our 4th year staying at Canton Beach after Christmas and once again we had an amazing 10 Night holiday. The staff at reception being welcoming and accommodating, clean facilities (bbq and toilets) and such a family friendly park whose number 1 priority is the safety of kids in the park. Our site was huge so didn’t feel like we were all close together and a cool breeze and amazing sunsets every night.

Very disappointing.
We booked the place for 2 night stay at camping site although the site was good but the experience was spoiled with only some  member of staff being rude and racist which ruined our trip because of their bad behaviour. A female staff who was unwelcoming from the beginning, was very harsh in her language; she also sent another staff to come to our site to check on us again!

Was accused by the manager of turning on the jumping pillow after hours. Absolutely disgraceful behaviour by the male manager. Would not recommend this park to anyone. I refuse to allow 2 grown men approach my camping site making such an accusations in such an intimating manner infront of our children. Will be reporting this to council!

Extremely disappointed with my stay. The staff were incredibly rude and unprofessional, making us feel unwelcome from the start. Their dismissive attitude ruined what should have been a relaxing trip. I would not recommend this place to anyone.

Extremely Disappointing Experience - Rude Staff Ruined Our Stay!

I recently stayed at Canton Beach Holiday Park, and while the cleaning and facilities were top-notch, everything else was a disaster. The customer service, particularly at reception, was appalling. The staff were incredibly rude and impolite, which completely overshadowed what could have been a decent stay.

We had booked two sites for our group, but the security staff were on edge and confrontational from the moment we arrived. Despite showing them our two bookings, they kept insisting that we shouldn’t have two cars on-site. After multiple attempts to explain, we were met with nothing but hostility. One security guard even threatened to cancel our bookings if he came back and saw more than two cars!

It was completely uncalled for and made us feel unwelcome the entire time. I get that rules need to be enforced, but a little politeness and understanding would go a long way. The lack of basic customer service and the rude, aggressive behavior of both the reception and security staff has completely soured my view of this place. It’s a shame because the park itself has potential, but I won’t be returning due to the awful treatment we received. Avoid this place if you value respect and good service!
Awesome park 10/10

We stayed at this park for 4 nights on a powered site. The rate was reasonable for the location. The staff were friendly and efficient. The amenities were clean and modern. The park was an easy walk to restaurants and cafes. We had a nice view of the lake. Our site was a bit bare grass wise but was spaceous. Would stay again.
Nice shaded camping sites facilities where very clean and well maintained staff where very friendly and helpful will stay here again when in the area

This was our second stay at Canton Beach Holiday Park and our time there was great. The owners and their staff are second to none as far as friendliness, accomodating, helpful and just always endeavouring to create the best experience while you’re there.
The cabins are well presented and maintained, clean, spacious and well equipped.
The location is beautiful and relaxing as well as close to everything while still being private and secluded.
It has a great camp kitchen and a bouncy pillow for the kids and I believe they plan to put a pool in shortly.
I will definitely be staying there when I’m next in the area.
Very nice place to stay. Well kept facilities and grounds. We will be back.

Amazing  ❤️❤️ this place had
One weeks holiday with my daughter so relaxing cabins lovely and clean , staff are lovely so helpful and  accommodating cannot wait to go there again .
Great people, great spot.
We enjoyed avery nice non powered camping area near the lake.

My husband and I spent 4 days at Canton Beach Holidays Park .Beautiful owners, Cabin was so clean and in a beautiful spot .We would recommend it to anyone .Canton Bowling Club have lovely chiness or Australian food .Highly Recommend 🩷💙
We absolutely love this place, place it beautiful, staff are absolutely awesome and the cabins are clean. We have stayed here 3 times now and will definitely go back again.
Beautiful place fantastic view nice staff

Staff are FANTASTIC, cabin was beautiful and clean. Spacious and fully furnished with full size fridge and all appliances.

We had a gorgeous water front cabin and it was so peaceful.
Kids LOVED the jumping pillow and go karts to ride around the complex.
Beautiful area. Will DEFINITELY be coming back again and again.

*Well done to all the staff.

Awesome place awesome staff. So helpful and friendly and go out of their way to accomodate all your needs. Left a shirt behind in the cabin and one of the staff, Tina went out of her way to post it back in her own time. Can’t remember the lady that helped with my booking I think Davina? She was so helpful transferring my booking from my aunty’s 100th birthday weekend to unfortunately my aunty’s funeral 2 months prior to her party. So it was a sudden arrangement that had to be made and they bent over backwards to fit us in . Such a wonderful place to stay overlooking the lake .
Wonderful new amenities, but lots if annuals

Stayed in a spa cabin when we came down to visit friends. The park is quite and right on the lake, had great views of the lake and sunset. Staff are friendly and the place was clean and tidy, Will definitely be back.
What a lovely place. 2nd time staying here. Its wonderful
Great place. Friendly service.

This park was just gorgeous, located on the banks of Tuggerah Lake and surrounded by lush gardens. Only a short walk from our en-suite campsite we found ourselves surrounded by rainforest.|The park and ammenities were very clean and our en-suite came complete with complimentary toiletries.|With this as our home base, we visited the Norah Head lighthouse and headed through The Entrance to visit Bouddi National Park and the Australian Reptile Zoo (about a 50 min drive) both are worth a visit.|We highly recommended a visit and hope to visit again someday.|It was very quiet during our off peak winter stay but I suspect it would get quite busy in summer!

It was a great park very clean and well maintained. The staff was so lovely and friendly always happy to help and always happy to answer any questions. Amenities and facilities Beautifully clean. This park is very accommodating for pets.  Checking in check out was so easily done. This park is in the top 5 favourite places.

Under utilised park.  It's huge.
Great sites , quiet, good amenities.  Friendly staff.
It's great for a council park.
New management is doing wonders.
Dog friendly.

Stayed here for a few weeks and really enjoyed the new amenities and the friendly managers and staff.
Highly recommend this park .
Stayed two nights in a cabin. We loved it, everything you need for a holiday for a family, cooking pots, Pan's ect. Clean, modern facilities and very scenic location with helpful and friendly staff.

Called into Canton Holiday Park on Saturday the 29th of June as i made a booking online to stay towards the end of the year 2024 with family as we are from the south coast i wanted to have a walk around and look at the cabins and park surroundings the staff went out of there way above and beyond  manager Troy drove my mum and i on hes buggy and showed us through the cabins all with there own style and out lay and beautiful and clean and near the water.We really appreciated Troy,Teena and staff for taking time out as they were so busy to attending to our needs.Today Monday the 1st of July i called into the park again to pay a deposit Manager Teena was so accomodating and helpful service was wonderful thankyou Troy and Teena looking forward to our up coming stay.
Awesome.place to stay especially for kids with a awesome play area. Nice big  camp kitchen inside and outside cooking.

Accomodation was beautiful - they placed us in a newly renovated cabin right in front of the water, with a park right across from us for our kids to enjoy & jumping pillow right behind us! Also a great convenient spot as a wedding we were attending was only 8 minutes away!

Thank you for being so accommodating - thank you to Troy also - so nice & genuine! Will definitely be staying here again when we’re back in the area next!
Good spot  bit smelly. I hope they get the council sorted out with the weed problem. We had an overnight stay only
It was a good price and ok to stay at

awesome caravan park and amenities I stayed in a basic cabin it was brand new!||Right on the lake all cabins have water views all cabins are near the bbq area and kids play ground.||The park is animal friendly||The staff are very helpful and friendly.||One of the best parks I have been to.|I will be back

awesome caravan park and amenities I stayed in a basic cabin it was brand new!

Right on the lake all cabins have water views all cabins are near the bbq area and kids play ground.

The park is animal friendly

The staff are very helpful and friendly.

I will be back
Great place to be at. Away from the city
One word... RUDE. Take your money somewhere else.
Very nice cabins near the lake .peaceful
New cabin on lake. Slight sea weed smell but that's nature. Nice staff. Cabin clean. Quiet and peaceful.
Great location
Had 4 cabins for our family came from different states of Oz . We had a caravan site . Was beautiful area and we all enjoyed ourselves. Lovely park with nice clean amenities.Staff were great 😃.
Amazing sunset. Overall it’s a 5 star experience.
Camped for a night on a powered site. Good sized sites. Not many there when we were there. Very quiet spot on the lake. Good camp kitchen.
Visiting to provide meals fo r a car group but staff are friendly and the place is spotless.

Stayed for a couple nights in a cabin. Cabin clean and tidy, great value for money. Location on canton beach is really nice, good view of the water. Staff went above and beyond to help me with an accident that occurred during my stay that was no fault of theirs. All around great experience, i was very satisfied with my stay here.
Family friendly, staff very accommodating. Ammenities Clean. Cabin was very clean. Nice relaxed atmosphere.

Location was absolutely amazing. Five minute walk not even from anywhere in the park to Tuggerah Lake. Office staff are absolutely amazing and park managers personally introduced themselves as they were both in the office. Gave me a number to call if any issues after hours and a map to help me find my site. Park was well maintained and staff are constantly cleaning amenities and keeping the grounds maintained. Couldn’t recommend this park more!!

Was trying to find the bins and got yelled at because I drove up the wrong road where equipment was but had no clue as it was dark and there was no signage than continued to follow us around the rest of our trip with golf buggy’s. WORST service ever would not ever be going back and will not recommend it to everyone save your money !!!!
That park has become quite dated. It’s council owned so needs a lot of work.

The location is good but lacks facilities/amenities. Being Council owned it’s been allowed to run down. The only attraction for children is a jumping pillow. Whilst the sites are level, the mats if provided are ripped and torn. The others have dirt or bits of grass.|Close to shops and a club but that about it.

Great staff, great rooms, and a wonderful location. There are lots of good facilities on site and the cabin we stayed in was incredibly spacious for 2 couples. Will definitely stay again in the future!

Not the best of holiday options around the area. We found the lack of cleanliness and facilities as the main problems. It might get better as the place was in the middle of transitioning to a new administration. I'll most probably give it a second chance and update my review accordingly.
大きなトランポリンで朝から夕方まで子供たちは楽しんでいました。台所もシャワーも綺麗で使い易かったです。

This holiday park was alright however we were put at the back of the park in a tent area with a caravan. The place does have internet but the far parts the internet doesn’t reach. The bathrooms weren’t the best, the doors were at least 50-70 cm of the ground and that low that my head could go over the top the showers were the same, the only good thing I could say about the bathrooms were that there was 1 disabled accessible shower and 1 disabled accessible toilet. Another good thing was that there was a river right on the park and wasn’t blocked off but it wasn’t the greatest swimming spot because the water was muggy and shallow practically as far as I could get out on a kayak which was at least a kilometre out and only got about 90 cm deep.
Really enjoyed our stay at this caravan park. Magic ensuite sites
Maintenance needed for self contained cabins. Leaking Showers, exhaust fan not working, floor needed a good wash.
Amazing place to just kick back and relax
Our home away from home. Great place to relax
